General.Name: Redco Healthy Living Co Ltd
General.Description: Redco Healthy Living Company Limited provides property management services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Property Management, Healthcare Services, and Others segments. It offers value-added services include pre-sale management, preliminary planning and design consultancy, inspection, cleaning, repair, and maintenance services to non-property owners; and community value-added services comprising home-living services, including delivery of daily necessities, housekeeping, and transportation services; intermediary services, such as operating clubhouses, community communication channel, swimming pools, sport facilities, playgrounds, and amusement centers; and property agency services consists of property brokerage for second hand properties, and home renovation and decoration services. In addition, the company is involved in the construction activities; and development and maintenance of IT systems for property developers, as well as provision of other IT-related services and other services; and healthcare management services. Further, it offers community healthcare services comprising online medical services, such as online consultation services; various diagnostic, medical, and surgical treatment services at the clinics; software solutions consulting, maintenance, upgrading, training, installation, configuration, and other support services; cloud services; and intelligent construction services. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China. Redco Healthy Living Company Limited operates as a subsidiary of Top Glory International Holdings Limited.
